how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Naturally Clean Water

steps.title: Assess Your Water System
steps.description: Tell us about your pool, spa, or water system. We'll evaluate your setup and recommend the right moss-based product — no obligation, no pressure.

steps.title: Install the Moss Technology
steps.description: Our patented Sphagnum moss products integrate seamlessly into your existing filtration. Simple installation takes minutes — no plumbing changes, no equipment upgrades needed.

steps.title: Enjoy Cleaner, Safer Water
steps.description: Watch your chemical usage drop while water quality improves. Monthly moss changes keep everything running smoothly — less work, lower costs, and water that feels better on skin.

about.label: Why Facilities Trust Us
about.headline: 23 Years Proving Nature Works Better
about.description: Founded in 2003 in Plymouth, Minnesota, Creative Water Solutions pioneered natural water treatment using proprietary Sphagnum moss technology. What started as research has become a proven platform deployed at Six Flags theme parks, YMCA facilities, universities, and Fortune 500 corporate campuses across the country. Every product we make is backed by over two decades of testing, NSF/ANSI standards compliance, and a simple mission: help water treatment work better while using fewer chemicals.

features.title: Patented Moss Technology
features.description: Our proprietary Sphagnum moss formulations are protected by patents and backed by 23 years of research and real-world deployment data.

features.title: Proven at Scale
features.description: From backyard pools to Six Flags waterparks, our technology performs at every scale. Over 500 commercial facilities trust CWS products daily.

features.title: Environmentally Responsible
features.description: Reduce chemical usage by up to 50%, lower water consumption, and minimize environmental impact — all while maintaining or exceeding water quality standards.

pricing.headline: Simple Solutions. Transparent Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the product that fits your water system. Residential kits start simple, commercial solutions scale to any facility size.

guarantee.headline: Our "Cleaner Water" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If our moss technology doesn't reduce your chemical usage and improve your water quality within 30 days, we'll work with you until it does — or refund your purchase. Over 23 years and hundreds of facilities prove our system works, and we stand behind every product we ship.

faqs.question: How does Sphagnum moss treat water?
faqs.answer: Our patented moss technology naturally conditions water by improving how treatment chemicals work. The moss helps stabilize pH, reduce biofilm buildup, and make sanitizers more effective — meaning you need far fewer chemicals to achieve the same or better water quality.

faqs.question: Will it work with my existing pool system?
faqs.answer: Yes. PoolMoss and SpaMoss products integrate into virtually any existing filtration system — chlorine, salt, bromine, or ozone. No plumbing changes or equipment upgrades needed. Installation typically takes under 15 minutes.

faqs.question: How often do I need to replace the moss?
faqs.answer: For residential pools and spas, we recommend monthly moss changes. Commercial facilities may have different schedules depending on volume and bather load. Each replacement is quick and simple — just swap the moss bag.

faqs.question: Is this proven for large commercial facilities?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our products are deployed at Six Flags theme parks, YMCA aquatic centers, university pools, and Fortune 500 corporate campus cooling systems. We have extensive case studies documenting results at scale.

faqs.question: Do you ship nationwide?
faqs.answer: Yes. While we're based in Plymouth, Minnesota, we distribute products nationwide through our dealer network and direct sales. Commercial clients receive dedicated support regardless of location.

testimonials.name: Lauri O.
testimonials.text: Used for years as water treatment for home and hot tub. Love it! The difference in water feel and clarity compared to heavy chemical treatment is remarkable. I'll never go back to the old way.

testimonials.name: Donna S.
testimonials.text: I have been swimming in a pool that uses this system for many years now. They told me it uses moss to filter the water. After that I never went swimming at other pools. I love this system!

testimonials.name: Six Flags Maintenance Dir.
testimonials.text: Creative Water Solutions PoolMoss Pro products have been successfully deployed across our water park and pool facilities, reducing chemical usage while maintaining excellent water quality standards.
